description_for_human: Connect to Salesforce to query records, create cases, and update opportunities.

functions.name: salesforce_whoami
functions.description: Return the current Salesforce user's identity.

functions.name: salesforce_query
functions.description: Execute a SOQL query and return trimmed records.

functions.name: salesforce_get_record
functions.description: Retrieve a single Salesforce record by sObject type and ID.

functions.name: salesforce_update_opportunity
functions.description: Update fields on an existing Opportunity.
